Метаданные AI memory service: sources, snapshots, chunks, graph facts, jobs, audit and eval cases
models.py: Модели metadata/authority слоя памяти без индексных backend-зависимостей
admin.py: Регистрация моделей памяти в Django Admin
deidentification.py: Детерминированная деидентификация и редактирование PII перед индексированием
graph_backends.py: Backend-neutral graph interfaces, Django graph backend and lazy Kuzu placeholder
ingestion.py: Индексация safe text в chunks, safe corpus, manifests, vector/full-text backend и graph facts
document_ingestion.py: Discovery/ingestion корпоративных документов из local/UNC источников, issue queue и graph schema bootstrapping helpers
chat_memory.py: Queued memory.remember, personal/org chat knowledge storage, reflection candidates and safe indexing
external_connectors.py: External API connector landing zone, standalone SQLite queue backend and memory handoff
policies.py: Политики доступа к chunks/facts по server-side scope tokens
retrieval.py: Оркестрация memory.search с server-side policy checks, citations и audit
routing.py: Server-side routing decisions for memory retrieval by sensitivity level
security.py: DLP-guard для блокировки credential material перед попаданием в memory pipeline
secret_backends.py: Provider-neutral secret handle backend with Vaultwarden-compatible external link MVP
selectors.py: QuerySet-селекторы источников, snapshots, chunks, graph facts и jobs
services.py: Сервисы синхронизации sources, lifecycle jobs и audit записи
vector_backends.py: Backend-neutral vector/full-text interface and embedded SQLite FTS implementation
management/: Management commands для memory source sync, smoke reindex и synthetic eval
management/commands/memory_sync_source.p: Синхронизация MemorySource из runtime/default memory source contracts
management/commands/memory_reindex.py: Backend-neutral smoke reindex job без Celery и без raw PII indexing
management/commands/memory_eval.py: Synthetic smoke/security eval для PII, secrets, forbidden scopes и denied routes
management/commands/memory_discover_sour: Discovery local/UNC source objects для ingestion корпоративных документов
management/commands/memory_ingest_source: Ingestion обнаруженных документов в safe corpus, chunks и graph facts
management/commands/memory_prepare_boots: Подготовка safe bootstrap package для сбора типов схемы графа
management/commands/memory_graph_schema_: Создание модерируемых schema proposals из bootstrap package
management/commands/memory_graph_extract: Автоматическое извлечение graph entities/review exceptions по утвержденной схеме
management/commands/memory_reflect_chats: Sleep-time reflection для queued chat memory requests и candidates
management/commands/memory_external_enqu: Enqueue normalized external API envelopes into the external connector queue
management/commands/memory_external_work: Worker для обработки external connector queue и handoff в memory ingestion
management/commands/memory_external_queu: Статус standalone external connector queue backend
